---
title: A few notes about GPUs
title-block-banner: true
---

:::{.topdef}

Before launching into courses involving GPUs, these short notes get you started on using GPUs on the Alliance clusters. They also briefly introduce [CUDA](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/CUDA) and how to access CUDA in Python.

:::

<br>
<!-- [[Start notes ➤](gpu_clusters.qmd)]{.topinline} -->

*Coming up on April 9.*
